rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes when referring to component ports.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Component type contracts should relate visible outputs to visible inputs without relying on implementation-only subcomponent paths.
Ensure AGREE variable declarations use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE contracts.
AGREE logical operators include and, or, not(...), and implication =>.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in a component type contract unless represented through valid variables or outputs.
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
